title: Spicy Portuguese Radish Skewers
description: A spicy and juicy Portuguese dish featuring radish, perfect for a crowd, and high in protein. This recipe is a unique twist on traditional Portuguese cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, or 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, piri piri sauce, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced radish and chicken breast to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated radish and chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the radish is tender.
Remove the skewers from the grill and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Let the skewers rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
